name: SIRIUS XM HOLDINGS INC.
business: Sirius XM Holdings Inc. is a leading audio entertainment company in North America operating two complementary businesses: SiriusXM subscription service and Pandora ad-supported and subscription streaming, along with a podcast network, advertising sales group, and ad technology solutions. The company generates revenue primarily from subscription fees and advertising sales, targeting consumers and advertisers across multiple platforms including satellite radio, streaming, and in-vehicle infotainment. SiriusXM also provides connected vehicle services and data services to automakers and other partners.

exposures.sentence: We provide our service through a fleet of orbiting geostationary satellites.
We have agreements with leading electric vehicle manufacturers, including Tesla, Lucid and Rivian, to integrate the SiriusXM experience into their vehicles.

Our portfolio includes our flagship subscription entertainment service, SiriusXM; the ad-supported and premium music streaming services of Pandora; the SiriusXM Podcast Network; an advertising sales group, SiriusXM Media; and a suite of advertising technology solutions, including AdsWizz.

catalysts.sentence: Construction of these satellites is underway, and those satellites are expected to be launched into geostationary orbits in 2026 and 2027, respectively.
Construction of these satellites is underway, and those satellites are expected to be launched into geostationary orbits in 2026 and 2027, respectively.

catalysts.event: CRB rate setting hearing additional arguments
catalysts.sentence: Additional arguments are scheduled for February 13, 2026.

On January 29, 2026, our board of directors declared a quarterly dividend on our common stock in the amount of $0.27 per share of common stock payable on February 27, 2026 to stockholders of record as of the close of business on February 11, 2026.
The increase was driven by higher legal costs, including amounts associated with a settlement reserve for certain litigation matters of $29 which is expected to be paid in 2026.
